heading: Application to Canada and Mexico
label: 4362 Application to Canada and Mexico
text: Pursuant to article 10.10 of the USMCA (as defined in ) and , this subchapter and the amendments made by this title shall apply with respect to goods from Canada and Mexico.section 4502 of this titlesection 4588 of this title1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter.
